tagline: Server card validation and trust evidence for teams publishing or approving remote MCP servers.
description: Server card validation and trust evidence for teams publishing or approving remote MCP servers.
audience: MCP publishers, platform reviewers, and security teams checking remote server metadata

offer.headline: Paid MCP trust validation package
offer.summary: A paid review turns server-card metadata, public documentation, endpoint behavior, ownership evidence, and client-readiness signals into a concise trust packet before listing or buyer review.
deliverables: Server-card JSON and endpoint claim audit
Ownership, contact, auth, and tool-scope evidence checklist
Listing-readiness verdict with blockers, owner, and next action
plans: One server-card validation report for a small MCP server or listing update.
Repeatable MCP trust packet, review checklist, and buyer-facing evidence summary.
Portfolio audit rhythm for multiple MCP servers, listing updates, and trust-center refreshes.

pages: Check server card identity, auth metadata, endpoint claims, and client-ready trust evidence before listing.
Turn server-card JSON, public docs, and endpoint behavior into a concise readiness verdict.
MCP trust center for server review
